description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python that runs on push to master and tags matching v*, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: python-sdist to create a source distribution, python-wheel to build wheels for multiple Python versions and platforms, and publish-pypi to publish the artifacts to PyPI. The python-sdist job checks out the repository, updates submodules, sets up Python 3.10, and packs the source distribution. The python-wheel job uses a matrix strategy to build wheels for various Python versions and platforms, and uploads the artifacts. The publish-pypi job downloads the artifacts, prepares the distribution, and publishes to Test PyPI and PyPI.
